title: Verify trial widget displays on homepage for Day 0-1 users
description: Test that the persistent high-visibility trial widget appears on the homepage for users on Day 0 or Day 1 of their trial
preconditions: User has an active trial on Day 0 or Day 1

steps.description: 1. Log in with a user account that has an active trial on Day 0 or Day 1
3. Observe the homepage for the trial widget

expected_result: Trial widget with shield/clock icon and 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining' text is displayed prominently
